Table of Contents

Interface IJSONArray2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides simplified DOM-like JSON serialization and de-serialization API.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("71208A81-C9E0-48C9-A81A-18558CB6EA2E")]
public interface IJSONArray2 : IJSONArray

TryGetValueAsInt64(int, out long)

Returns array value at a given index as LONGLONG. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsInt64(int Index, out long Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value long

Returns

bool

TryGetValueAsUInt64(int, out ulong)

Returns array value at a given index as ULONGLONG. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsUInt64(int Index, out ulong Value)

Parameters

Index int
Value ulong

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryGetValueAsVariant(int, int, out object)

Returns array value at a given index as a VARIANT of the requested type. If index is out of bounds or type coercion fails, returns VARIANT_FALSE in 'success' parameter.

bool TryGetValueAsVariant(int Index, int variantType, out object Value)

Parameters

Index int
variantType int
Value object

Returns

bool
